mapper.select:
select com_id, com_name, biz_no FROM company
and (com_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR biz_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY com_name ASC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: insert into company (com_name, indust_code, indust_name, com_ceo, biz_no, com_tel, com_logo) values (#{comName}, #{industCode}, #{industName}, #{comCeo}, #{bizNo}, #{comTel}, #{comLogo})
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company) AS com_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee) AS emp_total, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT indust_code) FROM company) AS indust_total, (SELECT com_name FROM company ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS com_latest
